name: Hero scene
purpose: Full-bleed homepage hero. Painterly Pixar-style studio with Bernese mountain dog, Golden Gate Bridge, cork board, sketchbook, monitor glow.
style_direction: Pixar painterly, warm golden hour, tilt-shift quality

name: Favicon — favicon.ico
purpose: Multi-resolution browser tab icon (16, 32, 48px)

name: Favicon — favicon.svg
purpose: Modern browser pinned tab support (vector)

name: Favicon — favicon-96x96.png
purpose: 96×96 PNG favicon

name: Apple touch icon
purpose: iOS home screen icon when site is added to home screen

name: Web app manifest 192
purpose: PWA install icon (192×192)

name: Web app manifest 512
purpose: PWA install icon (512×512)

name: site.webmanifest
purpose: JSON PWA manifest — name, icons, theme color, install behavior

name: Logo / wordmark
purpose: Primary logo on site nav. Future state: SVG variant + monochrome variants needed.
notes: Could use SVG conversion + monochrome variants for stationery/print.

name: Bento card art (full system)
purpose: Per-persona-per-slot character illustrations across 9 cards × 7 personas. 23 unique images covering all 63 combos.
style_direction: Pixar / Monsters Inc quality. Warm golden-hour. Per-character thematic environments. Compose for glassmorphism overlay dead-zone.

name: Persona portraits (set of 6)
purpose: Full-body character portraits for persona picker selection screen.
notes: Files: evaluator-merritt, seeker-phil, practitioner-drew, learner-paige, technologist-ray, innercircle-keshav

name: OG share cards (9 per content type)
purpose: Per-content-type social link previews. 1200×630 (1.91:1).
where_deployed: og:image meta tag on every site page
style_direction: Bento hero image as background + thin cream bottom band (120px) with eyebrow + title + byline. Generated programmatically.

name: 404 / error page monster
purpose: Monster illustration shared across 404, 500, 503, maintenance pages.
style_direction: Construction-monster Pixar character, hard hat + tool belt + blueprint, warm golden lighting.

name: Fenix mascot — avatar
purpose: Calm canonical Fenix portrait, head and chest. Used as chat widget avatar, favicon-mode, small thumbnail across CC and product surfaces.
where_deployed: index.html line 374 — 'Meet Fenix' intro logo (replaced images/logo.png). Future: chat widget avatar, alternate favicon (Fenix mode), CC dashboard Fenix tile.
style_direction: Pixar character animation cartoon mascot phoenix with raptor anatomy. Oversized expressive head, big warm friendly eyes, hooked eagle beak, prominent character brow. Subtle flame plumes on crest, gentle embers. Yellow chest, amber shoulders, crimson wingtips. Cream background.
notes: Calm canonical of the two-canonical Fenix system. Pair with maintenance regeneration (full-fire variant). Used as --sref anchor for downstream variants.

name: Fenix mascot — OG hero
purpose: Three-quarter body Fenix for social link previews on Fenix-related pages.
where_deployed: Available as og:image at images/og/og-fenix.png — wired on demand for any Fenix-related page
style_direction: Same Fenix character. Three-quarter body, relaxed alert pose. Right third of frame reserved for headline typography overlay.
notes: Source file lives in images/fenix/. Copied to images/og/og-fenix.png to match the per-content-type OG card naming pattern — that path is what gets referenced in og:image meta tags.

name: Fenix mascot — bento card hero
purpose: Workshop-studio scene of Fenix at work. Wired as the hero image on the site's password gate (under-construction overlay) — the first thing every visitor sees.
where_deployed: gate.js — site access gate (password overlay shown before any page until visitor enters workshop2026). Future: also slated for a homepage Fenix bento slot when the bento gets redesigned.
style_direction: Same Fenix character in a softly-lit warm studio environment, perched beside a glowing screen suggesting AI-assistant-at-work. Bottom-left dead zone for overlay.
notes: Originally seeded for a homepage bento Fenix slot (currently no slot exists). Repurposed as the gate hero — the workshop scene matches the 'site being built' message exactly.

name: Fenix mascot — error sign-holder
purpose: Apologetic Fenix holding a blank sign — the friendly error illustration for 404 / 500 / 503. Replaced the construction monster (images/404image.png).
style_direction: Same Fenix character standing sheepishly, holding blank wooden / paper sign in front of chest with one wing. Body language reads 'oops, sorry about that' — head tilted, free wing in shrug or back-of-head scratch.
notes: Sign is intentionally blank in source asset — text gets layered in via CSS or per-page render so each error code can show different copy.

name: Fenix mascot — maintenance regeneration
purpose: Fenix mid-rebirth, body fully engulfed in active flames. Used on the maintenance / lockdown screen — the phoenix metaphor IS the maintenance metaphor. Copy reads 'Fenix is regenerating. Back shortly.'
where_deployed: maintenance.html — applied via body.fenix-regenerating override in error-styles.css
style_direction: Same character but FULL-fire variant — entire body engulfed in active warm flames, rising calmly from soft glowing embers, head held up serenely, ONE wing softly raised. Inviting fire, not threatening — golden ember light, drifting sparks, no smoke.
source_method: Midjourney v7 (sref to flame canonical, sw 300)
notes: Flame canonical of the two-canonical Fenix system. Filename has typo (maintainance vs maintenance) — keep as-is for now to avoid breaking links.

name: Fenix mascot — manifesto opening frame
purpose: Opening frame source for the manifesto video. Fenix walking into frame from the right, looking at camera, ready to speak.
where_deployed: index.html manifesto section (C10) — wired as background-image poster on .manifesto-placeholder in styles.css. Also slated as source frame for videos/manifesto.mp4 once that lands.
style_direction: Same Fenix character entering frame from right, walking calmly forward, looking directly at camera, body language of a character about to speak. Soft warm depth-of-field studio behind. Negative space on right for first text title to fade in.
notes: Source frame for video. Animation/motion treatment is a separate workstream — this is the still that anchors it.

name: LinkedIn banner
purpose: Header banner for LinkedIn profile. Brand consistency from site to social.
style_direction: Mid-century editorial, Saul Bass / Paul Rand inspired. Cream background dominant + amber/teal/olive/rust accents. Leave clean dead-zone for typography overlay.

name: Twitter/X banner
purpose: Header banner for Twitter/X profile

name: GitHub profile banner
purpose: Header banner for GitHub profile README

name: "What is this site?" handout
purpose: Single shareable image pasted in DMs and warm intros. Explains the site at a glance.
style_direction: Mid-century editorial. Workshop/studio abstract composition. Bottom-third dead zone for typography.

name: Mood board imagery (8)
purpose: Visual references that anchor the brand identity. Lives in brand board (HTML).
style_direction: Mid-century editorial. Each image a single bold composition idea — no clutter, character, or text.

name: Social media campaign concepts (8-10)
purpose: Hypothetical IG/Twitter/LinkedIn launch campaign. Lives in marketing kit case study.
style_direction: Mid-century editorial. Designer adds headline typography in Canva post-MJ.

name: Hero cinemagraph
purpose: Animated version of homepage hero. Replaces static <picture> with <video>. Subtle motion only — steam, dog breathing, light shift.
notes: Full spec in docs/Website/Homepage/CONTINUATION-BENTO-HERO-COMPLETION.md

name: Manifesto / "Why this site exists" video
purpose: 45-60s click-to-play video below Fenix intro. Section C10 shell already shipped.
where_deployed: index.html line ~340 (HTML comment marks insertion point)
notes: Script locked in docs/PersonaPicker/PERSONA-PICKER.md §9

name: Color palette spec
purpose: Canonical color tokens — primary cream, deep ink, accent ambers/teals, semantic colors.
notes: Living spec. Tokens use oklch color space.

name: Typography system
purpose: Font families, weights, scale ramp, line-height system.

name: Character / monster system
purpose: 9 monsters mapped to content types. Pixar/Monsters-Inc style. Character bibles per role.
notes: Established Phase A. Source refs locked.

name: Aesthetic / visual language doc
purpose: Plain-English description of the look — what the brand feels like, what it's not.
notes: Useful for designer onboarding + AI prompt anchoring.

name: Business card — front
purpose: Networking / conference handout. Name + title + URL + QR code.
style_direction: Cream stock + deep-ink type. Mid-century editorial. QR code in subtle accent color. Spot UV optional.
notes: Print spec: full bleed 0.125", safe zone 0.125".

name: Business card — back
purpose: Reverse side — single design element (monster mark / wordmark / quote).

name: Letterhead
purpose: A4/Letter size letterhead for formal correspondence.
style_direction: Subtle header band, minimal footer. Prints clean B&W as fallback.

name: Envelope (#10)
purpose: Standard #10 business envelope with return address.

name: Notecard / thank-you card
purpose: Folded notecard for thank-yous after meetings, intros, gifts.

name: Business card holder design
purpose: Optional — branded business card holder for events.
notes: Low priority. Skip unless designer wants to spec it for completeness.

name: Pitch deck — full template
purpose: Slide template for pitches, talks, investor updates. Title / section / content / data slide variants.
style_direction: Cream slides, deep-ink type, character art on section dividers, mid-century chart styling.
notes: Should include: title, section divider, content (1-3 col), quote, data, image-bleed, contact slide.

name: Resume template — full kit
purpose: 9 resume templates (3 personas × 3 lengths) used by customize-resume skill.
notes: Lives in skill folder, not brand-kit/. Templates already shipped.

name: One-pager — about Kiran
purpose: Single-page intro doc — what Kiran does, who it's for, how to engage.
style_direction: Editorial layout, character art on margin. Like a magazine spread, not a brochure.

name: Case study template
purpose: Reusable template for writing up projects (Track Record stories, MadLab experiments).
notes: Should map cleanly to teardowns site format.

name: Press release template
purpose: Standard press release format with branded header.

name: Invoice template
purpose: Branded invoice for any future consulting / advisory work.

name: Proposal template
purpose: Multi-page proposal/SOW template with cover, scope, timeline, pricing sections.

name: Contract / agreement template
purpose: Branded contract template (cover/header treatment only — legal text from lawyer).
notes: Branding only. Body content is lawyer-supplied.

name: Memo / brief template
purpose: Short-form memo template for sharing thinking in a structured way.

name: Email signature
purpose: Branded email signature block — name, role, links, optional headshot.
style_direction: Type-only or with small monster mark. Loads cleanly on dark/light email clients.
notes: Test in Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail — image vs. type-only versions.

name: Newsletter template
purpose: If/when Kiran sends a newsletter — branded HTML email template.
notes: Match site editorial voice. Substack/Beehiiv/ConvertKit compatible.

name: Cold outreach email template
purpose: Branded HTML email for warm intros / cold outreach (with signature + intro paragraph).

name: Speaker bio (short + long)
purpose: Three lengths of speaker bio — 1 sentence / 1 paragraph / full page — for conference programs.
notes: Single source of truth. All three lengths in one file with separators.

name: Title slide template
purpose: First slide for any talk. Talk title + name + venue + date.
style_direction: Bold typography, minimal art. Should work as social-share image too.

name: Zoom / video call backgrounds
purpose: Branded virtual backgrounds for Zoom/Meet/Teams — 2-3 variants.
style_direction: Subtle character art behind, doesn't compete with face. Optional bookshelf / studio variants.

name: Podcast cover art
purpose: Square cover art if Kiran ever launches a podcast.
notes: Speculative. Park if podcast not on roadmap.

name: Speaker headshot variants
purpose: Multiple-angle headshot set for speaker pages, press, social.
notes: Photographer needed. Coordinate with future-state press kit.

name: LinkedIn avatar
purpose: Profile photo for LinkedIn. Same source as site headshot.

name: Twitter/X avatar
purpose: Profile photo for X.

name: GitHub avatar
purpose: Profile photo for GitHub.

name: GitHub social preview
purpose: Social card shown when a GitHub repo is linked anywhere (per-repo).
style_direction: Repo name + tagline + monster mark. Mid-century editorial.

name: Slack workspace icon
purpose: Square Slack workspace icon.

name: Notion / workspace icons
purpose: Tiny icons for Notion workspace, browser bookmarks, etc.

name: Sticker sheet
purpose: Vinyl stickers — monster characters, wordmark, key phrases. Conference giveaways.
style_direction: Die-cut. Bright but on-palette. Mix of character mark + wordmark + small phrases.

name: Conference poster
purpose: Large-format poster for any speaking engagement / event sponsor presence.
notes: Mid-century editorial. Saul Bass / National Park poster aesthetic.

name: T-shirt design
purpose: Branded t-shirt — front mark + optional back design. Conference / launch giveaway.
notes: DTG or screen-print compatible.

name: Tote bag design
purpose: Branded tote bag — wordmark or monster character.

name: Notebook / journal cover
purpose: Branded notebook cover — debossed/foil mark.
notes: Vendor-dependent (Moleskine custom, Field Notes, etc.).

name: Conference name badge
purpose: Custom name badge for events Kiran hosts/co-hosts.

name: Brand guidelines document
purpose: Master brand guidelines — palette, type, voice, logo usage, character system, examples.
style_direction: Editorial design publication. Like a real magazine, not a corporate slide deck.
notes: The capstone artifact. Compiles every other brand-doc asset.

name: Voice & tone guide
purpose: Voice rules, banned phrases, authenticity standards. Already written.
notes: Three docs together comprise the full voice spec.

name: Logo lockup variants
purpose: Horizontal / stacked / mark-only / monochrome / inverted variants of the logo.
notes: Replaces existing single PNG logo with proper system.

name: Color palette spec sheet
purpose: Print-ready palette spec — hex / RGB / CMYK / Pantone / oklch.
notes: Generates from VISUAL-STANDARDS.md tokens.

name: Type spec sheet
purpose: Type system spec — fonts, weights, scale, line-height, letter-spacing for digital + print.

name: Icon set
purpose: Custom icon system — replaces generic Lucide / Heroicons throughout site + decks.
style_direction: Mid-century editorial line work. Slightly hand-drawn feel.

name: Pattern library
purpose: Reusable background patterns / textures for marketing collateral.

name: Photo treatment guide
purpose: LUT / color grade preset for any photography shot for the brand.

name: Watermark / signature mark
purpose: Subtle mark for protecting / signing original artwork posted online.

name: Professional headshots
purpose: Studio-quality headshots — multiple expressions / wardrobe / backgrounds.
notes: Photographer engagement needed. Coordinate with speaker headshots above.

name: Press kit
purpose: Bundle of speaker bios, headshots, logos, fact sheet — for press inquiries.
notes: Aggregates assets from speaking + platform + brand-docs categories.
